footer.tagline: The intelligence that separates those who win from those who participate.
footer.origin: Chile is our origin. The world is our market.

home.heroTitle: One human. Thirteen agents. More tenders won than a team of fifty.
home.heroSubtitle: Co-Kizuna is the global intelligence methodology for public procurement run as a One-Person Company: one human up front, thirteen specialized agents behind. The 1∞ asymmetry that changes the rules.
home.heroSupport: A global reference. Chile is our origin. The world is our market.
home.heroReinforcement: You don't just access data. You access an advantage. Use it well.
home.problemBody: In global public procurement, some actors have dedicated analytics teams. Others rely on intuition or outdated information. That asymmetry distorts competition. And when competition is uneven, everyone loses — except those who hold the information.
home.problemBody2: Co-Kizuna closes that gap. We democratize access to actionable intelligence as a paid service with demonstrable value.
home.problemReinforcement: Those who choose Co-Kizuna don't just access data — they access an advantage. And advantage, used well, becomes results.
home.methodTitle: Twelve principles that make the difference.
home.methodBody: We're not just another software product. We're a methodology built on twelve operating principles that ensure quality, explainability, equity and continuous learning.
home.methodReinforcement: When you understand the methodology behind intelligence, you stop reacting and start anticipating.
home.instrumentsSubtitle: Data is not enough. You must know what to do with it. Co-Kizuna gives you the instruments.
home.providersTitle: Play with an edge. Win more bids.
home.providersBody: You compete in a market where your competitors are already using intelligence. Can you afford not to?
home.providersList: Opportunity anticipation · Price intelligence · Competitive analysis · Buyer patterns · Scenario simulation
home.providersReinforcement: Every alert is an opportunity. Every opportunity well used is a bid won.
home.buyersBody: Design better tenders. Evaluate without bias. Audit with efficiency. Early access for leading institutions.
home.dimensionsBody: Eleven lenses to understand — and transform — any public procurement ecosystem.
home.globalTitle: A global reference. Born in Chile.
home.globalBody: Co-Kizuna was born in Chile, where we built, tested and validated our methodology. Today we are a global reference in public procurement intelligence.
home.finalTitle: The intelligence that separates winners from participants.
home.finalBody: In a competitive market, information is necessary but not sufficient. Intelligence is the difference. Co-Kizuna is that difference.
home.finalReinforcement: Leaders don't wait for the market to change — they anticipate the change. You've already taken the first step. Let's take the next one together.

about.title: Co-Kizuna: the global intelligence methodology for public procurement.
about.definitionBody: Co-Kizuna is an intelligence methodology for the global public procurement ecosystem. Not a software. Not a database. Not a transparency portal. It is a body of principles, procedures and tools that transforms the chaos of open data into actionable knowledge — and puts that knowledge at the service of those who make decisions.
about.definitionReinforcement: We don't sell software. We sell the ability to win bids, optimize resources and decide with an edge.
about.philosophyBody: We believe intelligence in public procurement must be an advantage within reach of those willing to use it.
about.philosophyList: We don't believe in opacity. We believe in algorithmic transparency (Kaiji).|We don't believe in black boxes. We believe in analytic simplicity (Kanso).|We don't believe in learning without validation. We believe in demonstrable continuous improvement (Keizoku kaizen).|We don't believe in tools for the few. We believe in democratizing access to quality intelligence as an accessible paid service.
about.philosophyClose: Open data is a right. Intelligence, an advantage. And advantage, used well, transforms markets.
about.originKizunaBody: Lasting bonds built on trust. Japan's kanji of the year in 2011.
about.originCoKizunaBody: The active and collaborative bond between actors, data and decisions.
about.originMethod: Co-Kizuna was born in Chile, where we identified a global opportunity: open procurement data exists, but the intelligence to understand it does not. We built our methodology on Japanese continuous-improvement philosophy, OECD standards and global success cases.
about.originReinforcement: What we built in Chile we take to the world. Not because it's easy — because it's necessary.
about.visionBody: To be the global reference in public procurement intelligence. We envision a world where an SME supplier has the same capability as a multinational, an auditor the same tools in any country, and a citizen can understand where their money goes.
about.visionClose: That world doesn't exist today. We are building it.
about.founderRole: Founder and sole operator of Co-Kizuna
about.founderBio: Behind this entire methodology there is a real person who uses it and tests it every day. Co-Kizuna operates as a One-Person Company (OPC): one human up front, thirteen specialized agents behind. The 1∞ asymmetry is not a slogan — it is the model.
about.founderQuote: «I don't sell software and I don't sell hours. I sell the result of operating with thirteen agents while the competition operates with spreadsheets.»
about.teamBody: Around the founder, a lean network of advisors contributing public-procurement, data and methodological-design experience.

methodology.title: 12 principles. 11 dimensions. 6 decisions. One methodology.
methodology.intro: The method behind the intelligence. Each principle answers a question. Each dimension, an angle. Each decision, a moment.
methodology.principlesIntro: Built on Japanese continuous-improvement philosophy. Each principle includes its essence, application and antiprinciple.
methodology.decisionsIntro: Intelligence alone is not enough. You must know which decision to make with it.
methodology.decisionsReinforcement: Most react. Those who anticipate, win. Those who learn, never stop winning.
methodology.cycleIntro: Four phases with continuous learning loops.
methodology.validationBody: Aligned with OECD, ISO, World Bank and IDB. A methodology comparable to global references such as ProZorro and Alice.

instruments.title: From intelligence to action.
instruments.subtitle: No decision without instrument. No instrument without intelligence. Co-Kizuna gives you both.
instruments.canvasTitle: Zentei. The canvas that transforms how a supplier decides.
instruments.canvasBody: One page. Nine blocks. Eighteen minutes. A better-documented decision.
instruments.canvasReinforcement: Every bid you win begins with a good decision. Every good decision begins with a well-completed canvas.
